hero.subtitle_line1: Natively takes perfect meeting notes and gives real-time answers,
hero.interface_desc: Natively is the ultimate hybrid AI assistant. Run models 100% locally for zero cloud exposure, or plug in OpenAI/Claude for cloud-grade reasoning. Invisible, undetectable, and totally free.
hero.input_placeholder: Ask anything about the screen or conversation
hero.interface_ai_response: I hear you on the integration concerns, that's usually the first thing that comes up. We've actually built direct connectors for the tools you mentioned, and our average setup time is only half a day.

features.title:
Four ways we make your
meetings better
features.card1_title: AI that answers questions for you, real-time
features.card1_desc: The right answer, right when you need it. Natively listens, understands, and whispers exactly what to say.
features.card2_desc: Your data stays yours. Or go cloud for maximum intelligence. Natively works beautifully either way.
features.card3_desc: Combines your resume, job description, and custom context to answer with precision.
features.card4_desc: Structured, searchable notes with action items, decisions, and key moments.
features.card4_notes_desc: Instant shareable meeting notes by AI

steps.title: Meeting notes in 3 steps
steps.subtitle: The easiest way to get beautiful, shareable meeting notes.
steps.step1_desc: Open Natively before your meeting starts. It works with Zoom, Meet, and Teams.
steps.step2_desc: Stop the recording when your meeting finishes to process the transcript.
steps.step3_desc: Receive your structured notes and action items instantly in your inbox.

transcription.providers_desc: We support over 8 different speech providers, including Deepgram, Google, and our all-in-one Natively API.
transcription.response_time_desc: We have the fastest live transcription available. Test us against any other competitor.
transcription.accuracy_desc: Trusted by many teams for reliable transcription. All processed with industry-leading accuracy.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. You can use it 100% free by connecting to a local Ollama instance. Alternatively, bring your own API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, OpenRouter, Custom endpoints), or use our managed Natively API if you want an all-in-one cloud setup for a small fee.
faq.q2: Does Natively work with Zoom, Teams, and Google Meet?
faq.a2: Yes. Natively uses a Rust-based system audio capture that works universally across any desktop application, including Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet, Slack, and Discord.
faq.a3: Natively is built on Privacy-by-Design. All transcripts, vector embeddings (Local RAG), and keys are stored locally on your machine. We have no backend and collect zero telemetry.
faq.q4: Can I use it for technical interviews?
faq.a4: Natively is a powerful assistant for any professional situation. However, users are responsible for complying with their company policies and interview guidelines.
faq.a5: Yes. Natively runs entirely on your machine and captures system audio directly. It does not join calls as a bot, extensions, or browser plugins, making it 100% invisible to other participants.
faq.a6: Natively works with every meeting platform that runs on your computer, including Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet, Slack Huddles, Discord, and Webex.
faq.q7: Can I use it with headphones?
faq.a7: Yes! Natively captures the audio stream directly from your system, so it works perfectly whether you're using speakers, wired headphones, or Bluetooth headsets.
faq.q8: How is this different from Otter or Fireflies?
faq.a8: Unlike Otter or Fireflies, Natively does not send a bot to join your meetings. This means no awkward "AI Note Taker is recording" announcements and complete privacy for your conversations.

cta.title: Meeting AI that helps during the call, not after.
cta.subtitle: Try Natively on your next meeting today.

download_modal.title: How to install Natively
download_modal.step1_desc: Open Natively.zip from your Downloads folder.
download_modal.step2_desc: Drag Natively.app into your Applications folder.
download_modal.step3_desc: This is a standard check for unsigned apps. It's safe to proceed.
download_modal.step4_desc: Paste into Terminal, hit Enter, then open the app again.

linux_modal.title: Linux Support Coming Soon
linux_modal.desc: We're actively working on a Linux build. Stay tuned for updates!
